reviews.comment:
Mucha propaganda y poco servicios. Los precios de camping y alojamientos son más altos que los de plaza considerando que estamos en temporada baja. Carlos Gasparetti

(Translated by Google)
Lots of advertising and few services. Camping and accommodation prices are higher than those in the town, even though it's low season. Carlos Gasparetti

reviews.comment:
Pequeña el área de carga de combustible, en plena temporada muy llena. Buena atención. El full muy completo, lindo, limpio y grande

(Translated by Google)
The fuel loading area is small and very crowded during peak season. The service is good. The fully equipped vehicle is nice, clean, and spacious.
